title: Personalized Email for Customer Service
scenario: Create a personalized email for a customer service representative to respond to a customer's complaint. The email should acknowledge the customer's complaint, apologize for the inconvenience, and offer a solution to the problem. The email should be under 150 words and include a clear call-to-action.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the email meets the word count and call-to-action requirements.
Evaluate if the tone is apologetic and solution-focused.
Check for any grammar or spelling errors.
Evaluate if the email is clear and easy to understand.
